title: wrap-around 8-bit counter (checked-overflow rule)
statement: A free-running 8-bit hardware tick counter counts 0,1,2,...,255 and then WRAPS back to 0 on the next tick (this is the whole point of a modular counter). Define `fn tick(c: u8) -> u8` returning the counter's next value, so `tick(255)` is `0`. Note (docs/specpack/semantics.md): Candor arithmetic is CHECKED by default — a bare `c + 1` overflows and FAULTS at `255`; the modular wrap-around must be written in an explicit `wrapping {}` regime. Define only this function.
